mapper.select: /* TM_PB10001_Dao_retrievePlanCnstrcElctrnDoc */ SELECT plan_esntl_id, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, plan_bsns_nm, ecs_chrg_dept_id, plan_charger_empno, plan_foundng_de, plan_eqp_cpcty, plan_amt, rm_ctnt, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, updt_rsn FROM tm_pb10001 WHERE plan_esntl_id = #{planEsntlId} ORDER BY last_updt_dt DESC
mapper.update:
/* TM_PB10001_Dao_savePlan */ MERGE INTO tm_pb10001 A USING ( SELECT #{planEsntlId} AS plan_esntl_id, #{ecsSetcscDivCd} AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, #{planBsnsNm} AS plan_bsns_nm,
#{planEqpCpcty} AS plan_eqp_cpcty, #{planAmt} AS plan_amt, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.plan_esntl_id = B.plan_esntl_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd = B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.plan_bsns_nm = B.plan_bsns_nm,
A.plan_eqp_cpcty = B.plan_eqp_cpcty, A.plan_amt = B.plan_amt, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.plan_esntl_id, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.plan_bsns_nm,
A.plan_eqp_cpcty, A.plan_amt, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.plan_esntl_id, B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, B.plan_bsns_nm,
B.plan_eqp_cpcty, B.plan_amt, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )

/* TM_PB10001_Dao_savePlanData */ MERGE INTO tm_pb10001 A USING ( SELECT #{planEsntlId} AS plan_esntl_id, #{ecsChrgDeptId} AS ecs_chrg_dept_id, #{planChargerEmpno} AS plan_charger_empno, #{planFoundngDe} AS plan_foundng_de FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.plan_esntl_id = B.plan_esntl_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_chrg_dept_id = B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.plan_charger_empno = B.plan_charger_empno, A.plan_foundng_de = B.plan_foundng_de WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.plan_esntl_id, A.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.plan_charger_empno, A.plan_foundng_de ) VALUES ( B.plan_esntl_id, B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, B.plan_charger_empno, B.plan_foundng_de )

/* TM_PB10001_Dao_updatePlanCpctyAmtCtnt */ UPDATE TM_PB10001 SET plan_eqp_cpcty = #{planEqpCpcty}, plan_amt = #{planAmt}, rm_ctnt = #{rmCtnt}, updt_rsn = #{updtRsn}, last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, last_updusr_id = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE plan_esntl_id = #{planEsntlId}
